data.url: javascript: function goTo (anchorText) { var anchors = document.querySelectorAll('#TINY_MENU a, #MOBILE_ACTIONS_MENU a'); var i; for (i = 0; i < anchors.length; i++) { if (anchors[i].text == anchorText) { anchors[i].click(); anchors[i].click(); break; } } } function getMenu() { if (typeof Wix != 'undefined') { Wix.Settings.getSitePages(function(sitePages) { var mainUrl = window.location.href.toString(); var homePageId, items = []; $(sitePages).each(function(i, page) { if (page.hide) return true; if (page.id) { if (page.isHomepage) { if (!homePageId) { homePageId = page.id; page.url = mainUrl + '#!' + encodeURIComponent(page.title.replace(/ /g, '-')) + '/' + page.id; } } else if (page.title && page.id) { page.url = mainUrl + '#!' + encodeURIComponent(page.title.replace(/ /g, '-')) + '/' + page.id; page.isSubPage = false; } } items.push(page); if (page.subPages && page.subPages.length > 0) { page.subPages.forEach(function (subPage) { if (subPage.hide) return true; if (subPage.id) { subPage.url = mainUrl + '#!' + encodeURIComponent(subPage.title.replace(/ /g, '-')) + '/' + subPage.id; subPage.isSubPage = true; subPage.parent = page.id; } items.push(subPage); }); delete page['subPages']; } }); console.log('Assets acquired, returning to base...'); JsHandler.onMenuRetrieved(JSON.stringify(items)); }); } else { $.ajax({ type:'GET', url: 'http://static.parastorage.com/services/js-sdk/1.61.0/js/wix.min.js', dataType: 'script', async: true, complete: function (jqXHR, textStatus) { console.log('Wix SDK injected!'); getMenu(); }, error: function(xhr, textStatus, errorThrown) { window.sdkGet = false; console.log('Failed to retrieve site pages: ' + textStatus); } }); } } JsHandler.onHtmlProcessed();
